_comment: Canonical token manifest for HELM placeholder system (PLACEHOLDER-LIFECYCLE-001). Every {{USER_*}} token defined once. collect: onboarding|auto|vault|derived

USER_JERRY.desc: what to call the user (first name or preferred name)
USER_JERRY.question: What should I call you? (first name)

USER_GMAIL.question: Gmail address for Claude login (leave blank to use same as primary email):

USER_DOMAIN.desc: user's web domain (optional — for hosting tools)
USER_DOMAIN.question: Your web domain, if you have one (e.g. example.com), or press Enter to skip:

USER_GITHUB.question: GitHub username (for syncing your HELM config):

USER_DISCORD_SERVER_ID.question: Discord Server ID (right-click server name → Copy Server ID):

USER_ID.desc: Discord user ID of the owner
USER_ID.question: Your Discord User ID (right-click your name → Copy User ID):

USER_VPS_IP.question: VPS IP address (for remote recovery server), or press Enter to skip:

USER_FAMILY_MEMBER_1.question: Name of a key family member to personalize context (or press Enter to skip):

USER_FAMILY_MEMBER_2.question: Another family member name (or press Enter to skip):

USER_EMAIL_ALT.question: Alternate or junk email address to filter out (or press Enter to skip):

USER_EMAIL_JUNK.desc: junk/secondary email address to exclude from email ingest (alias for USER_EMAIL_ALT)

USER_GITHUB_EMAIL.desc: GitHub-linked email address (often a personal Gmail used for GitHub auth)
USER_GITHUB_EMAIL.question: GitHub-linked email address (leave blank to use same as primary email):

USER_VPS_TAILSCALE_IP.question: VPS Tailscale IP address (or press Enter to skip):

USER_SSH_HOST.desc: SSH connection string for Mac Mini (user@ip or user@tailscale-hostname)

USER_STATUS_HOST.desc: Hostname for VPS status/recovery server (e.g. status.example.com)

USER_CHANNEL_HELM_IMPROVEMENTS.desc: Discord channel ID for helm-improvements (main user-facing channel)

USER_CHANNEL_HELM_AUDIT.desc: Discord channel ID for helm-audit (internal log channel)

USER_CHANNEL_HELM_STATUS.desc: Discord channel ID for helm-status (system health channel)

USER_CHANNEL_BETA_USERS.desc: Discord channel ID for beta/additional-users testing channel
